header.title: Hubei Zhi'ao Thread Industry Co., Ltd.
header.welcome: Chào mừng đến với Zhi'ao Thread

footer.desc: Zhi'ao Thread là nhà sản xuất chỉ may chất lượng cao hàng đầu toàn cầu với hơn 20 năm kinh nghiệm sản xuất, cam kết mang đến giải pháp may vượt trội cho ngành dệt may trên toàn thế giới.
footer.address: Khu công nghiệp Chenghuang, Hanchuan, Hubei, Trung Quốc

seo.title: Zhi'ao Thread - Nhà sản xuất chỉ may polyester
seo.keywords: chỉ may polyester, 40/2, 40/3, 20/2, 20/3, 60/2, chỉ may công nghiệp, nhà máy chỉ may, bán sỉ, tùy chỉnh
seo.description: Zhi'ao Thread là nhà sản xuất chỉ may polyester cho may mặc, túi xách và dệt may gia dụng. Nguồn cung ổn định, hỗ trợ tùy chỉnh và chất lượng xuất khẩu cho 40/2, 40/3, 20/2, 20/3, 60/2.

hero.title: Giải pháp chỉ may chất lượng cao cho mọi ngành
hero.subtitle: Tỉ mỉ trong từng mũi may, chính xác trong từng cuộn chỉ

slide1.subtitle: We manufacture premium polyester, nylon, cotton, and specialty threads for apparel, footwear, home textiles, and industrial applications.

card.title: Premium Thread Series
card.subtitle: For a wide range of applications

slide2.subtitle: Our 40/2 polyester sewing thread is a bestseller made from high-quality polyester fibers. It features high strength, excellent abrasion resistance, and strong color fastness, suitable for most garment production scenarios.

slide3.subtitle: Designed for heavy fabrics, our 20/2 thick polyester thread uses high-strength double-ply twisting for outstanding tensile strength and abrasion resistance, ideal for bags, sofas, automotive interiors, and other heavy-duty scenarios.

hero.title: Giới thiệu
hero.subtitle: Từ năm 2009, đối tác tin cậy cho giải pháp chỉ may chất lượng cao

story.title: Nhà sản xuất chỉ may hàng đầu tại Trung Quốc
story.desc: Thành lập năm 2009, Zhi'ao Thread là nhà sản xuất và cung cấp chỉ may công nghiệp chất lượng cao. Chúng tôi sở hữu nhà máy hiện đại 25.000㎡ với dây chuyền kéo sợi, se, nhuộm và quấn ống tiên tiến, công suất 5.000 tấn/năm. Sản phẩm được xuất khẩu tới hơn 50 quốc gia, phục vụ hơn 2.000 khách hàng trên toàn thế giới.

profile.title: Company Profile
profile.desc1: Founded in the 1990s, SewPro is headquartered in China's primary sewing thread production hub. Through over 30 years of steady growth, we have evolved into a modern, large-scale enterprise integrating R&D, production, and sales.
profile.desc2: We operate modern production facilities spanning over 50,000 square meters, equipped with world-leading spinning, twisting, dyeing, and winding machinery. With an annual capacity exceeding 20,000 tons, our products reach over 100 countries worldwide.

mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.mission_desc: To provide premium sewing thread products and outstanding service, helping customers produce high-quality goods efficiently and economically.
mission_bullets: Every product we make carries a commitment to excellence
Continuous innovation to meet evolving industry needs
Long-term partnerships built on trust and mutual benefit
Sustainable production practices and environmental responsibility
mission.vision_desc: To be a leading global sewing thread solutions provider, recognized for product quality, technical expertise, and commitment to customer success.
vision_bullets: Expand globally and serve customers worldwide
Invest in R&D to create innovative sewing thread products
Adopt advanced manufacturing to improve efficiency
Set industry benchmarks for quality, sustainability, and ethical manufacturing
Build a more reliable and stable global supply capability

values.title: Core Values That Drive Our Growth
values.subtitle: These fundamental values guide our decisions and define who we are as a company.

items.title: Quality First
items.desc: We focus on quality at every step—from material selection to final inspection—to ensure consistent performance.

items.title: Customer First
items.desc: We respond quickly with professional suggestions and support to help customers improve efficiency and competitiveness.

items.title: Innovation & Progress
items.desc: We continuously invest in R&D and process upgrades to deliver more stable, durable, and sustainable solutions.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: We operate with honesty, transparency, and ethical standards, building long-term trust with partners.

items.title: Teamwork
items.desc: Collaboration across teams and continuous talent development drive our execution and growth.

items.title: Sustainability
items.desc: We integrate environmental responsibility into production, promoting energy saving and eco-friendly materials.

process.title: Our Production Process
process.subtitle: Advanced facilities and strict quality control ensure every spool meets our high standards.

steps.title: Raw Material Selection & Inspection
steps.desc: We source premium virgin polyester, nylon, and cotton fibers from qualified suppliers. Every batch is strictly inspected before entering production.

steps.title: Twisting & Plying
steps.desc: Fibers are spun into yarn, then twisted and plied to meet the required ticket and tensile strength. Precision equipment ensures uniformity and stability.

steps.title: Dyeing & Color Matching
steps.desc: We use high-quality, eco-friendly dyes for excellent color fastness. Our color team supports customized color matching services.

steps.title: Winding & Lubrication
steps.desc: Dyed threads are wound into cones or spools per requirements. Special lubrication reduces friction and improves sewability and performance.

steps.title: Quality Inspection & Testing
steps.desc: Each batch is tested in our in-house lab, including tensile strength, elongation, and color fastness. Detailed quality reports are available.

steps.title: Packaging & Delivery
steps.desc: Products are packaged per customer specifications with clear labeling and batch tracking. Our logistics team supports timely global delivery.

team.title: Meet Our Leadership Team
team.subtitle: Our experienced management team brings decades of expertise in textiles and sewing threads.

members.name: David Wang
members.desc: With 30+ years of industry experience, he founded SewPro in 2003 and leads strategy and global business development.

members.name: Dr. Emily Zhang
members.desc: Leads R&D and quality teams, focusing on product innovation, process optimization, and technical support.

members.name: Michael Johnson
members.desc: Oversees global markets and customer success, building overseas channels and matching customers with the right solutions.

members.name: Richard Liu
members.desc: Responsible for production management and delivery assurance, driving lean manufacturing and continuous improvement.

factory.subtitle: Take a virtual tour of our modern manufacturing base equipped with advanced production facilities.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find common answers about our products, ordering process, and services.

items.q: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
items.a: For standard items, the MOQ is 100 cartons per color. For custom colors, the MOQ is 300 cartons per color. We also accept small trial orders for new customers—please contact our sales team for details.

Yes. We can provide standard color samples for testing and confirmation. Please share the product type, specification, and color requirements, and we will arrange delivery (shipping policy depends on the case).

items.q: What is your production lead time?
items.a: In-stock items can be shipped quickly. Custom orders typically take 7–15 business days, depending on product type, color, and quantity.

items.q: Do you offer custom color matching?
items.a: Yes. We support color matching based on color codes or physical samples, and can adjust targets for shade and fastness according to your requirements.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We commonly support T/T. Payment terms for bulk orders can be discussed based on cooperation and order details.

items.q: Can you provide customized packaging with our logo?
items.a: Yes. We support custom labels and carton printing. Please provide your artwork files and packaging requirements.

cta.title: Get a Quote Now
cta.subtitle: Contact our sales team for competitive pricing, free samples, and tailored sewing thread solutions for your business.
